headline: Is Colgate Palmolive (CL) Price Weakness Creating A Long-Term Opportunity?
summary: If you are wondering whether Colgate-Palmolive at around US$85.55 is offering fair value right now or if the price is outpacing its fundamentals, this article walks through the key signals to help you frame that question clearly. The stock has moved only 0.2% over the last 7 days, but that comes after an 8.0% decline over 30 days, a 10.1% return year to date, and a 2.9% decline over the last year, set against gains of 20.8% over 3 years and 21.3% over 5 years.
